summary: Phase 7 Part 3 comprehensive testing complete. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: Admin Payment Sales tab, Field Manager role, Accounts Dashboard, Payment Check system, Share features. All role-based access controls working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 7 Part 3 features implemented correctly
Role-based access control properly enforced at backend level
Payment re-check logic working: when payment updated on 'received' order, status changes to 'pending_recheck'
Field manager correctly restricted to own orders only
seed_data_creation: Created accounts1 and field1 users during testing if not present
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 Part 3 fully tested. Key features verified: (1) Admin Payment Sales tab with executive/period selectors and Excl. GST/Shipping checkboxes - WORKING. (2) Admin All Orders filters (Period, Status, Payment, Check Status, Executives) - WORKING. (3) Check column shows Re-check (red), Pending (yellow), Received (green) badges - WORKING. (4) Admin Users tab can create field_manager and accounts roles - WORKING. (5) Accounts Dashboard shows 5 metrics (Invoices Uploaded, GST Without Invoice, Payments Received, Payments Pending, GST Orders Total) - WORKING. (6) Accounts Tax Invoices tab shows ONLY GST orders with Upload PDF button - WORKING. (7) Accounts Payment Check tab shows ALL orders with Mark Received/Pending buttons - WORKING. (8) Payment check restricted to accounts role only (admin/telecaller/field_manager get 403) - WORKING. (9) Payment re-check logic: mark received -> update payment -> status becomes pending_recheck - WORKING. (10) Field Manager sees TelecallerDashboard with correct sidebar nav - WORKING. (11) Field Manager All Orders shows ONLY own orders (0 for new user) - WORKING. (12) Field Manager does NOT see Check column or Sales (Payments Received) section - WORKING. (13) PI list has Share buttons (green share icon) - WORKING. (14) Order Detail has Share Images button for packing images - WORKING. (15) Backend /api/reports/payment-sales returns 403 for field_manager - WORKING. (16) Backend /api/orders/{id}/payment-check returns 403 for admin - WORKING.

features_tested.admin_payment_sales_tab: PASS - shows executive selector, period selector, Excl. GST/Shipping
features_tested.admin_all_orders_filters: PASS - Period, Status, Payment, Check Status, Executives filters working
features_tested.user_management_roles: PASS - field_manager and accounts roles available
features_tested.accounts_tax_invoices_tab: PASS - shows only GST orders with Upload PDF
features_tested.accounts_payment_check_tab: PASS - shows all orders with Mark Received/Pending
features_tested.payment_recheck_logic: PASS - status changes to pending_recheck on payment update
features_tested.pi_share_button: PASS - Share buttons visible in PI list
